info.name: Horse Racing Foundation APIs - Admin CRUD, Horse, Jockey

request.description: Expected 200. Copy token to jockeyToken and userId to jockeyUserId.
Expected 200. Save seasonId. Also test GET/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/seasons/{id}.
Expected 200. Save meetingId. Also test GET/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/race-meetings/{id}.
Expected 200. Requires conditionId from DB; staffId/refereeId may be null or existing profile ids. Save raceId.
Expected 200 for any authenticated user. Admin alternative: GET /api/admin/races/open.
Expected 200. ownerId is taken from token. Save horseId. Also test GET/PUT/DELETE /api/owner/horses/{id}.
Expected 200 OK. Returns only the horses owned by the authenticated owner.
Expected 200 OK. Returns the horse details.
Expected 200 OK. Updates the horse info.
Expected 404 Not Found. A different owner tries to access Owner A's horse.
Expected 404 Not Found. Owner B tries to update Owner A's horse.
Expected 401 Unauthorized. Accessing owner horses with no token.
Expected 403 Forbidden. Jockey token is used to access owner horses.
Expected 200 if user role is JOCKEY. Save jockeyId. Also test GET/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/jockeys/{id}.
Expected 200. Save raceConditionId. Also test GET/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/race-conditions/{id}.
Expected 200. GET /api/admin/race-conditions and GET /api/admin/race-conditions/{id} should also return 200.
Expected 200. Save prizeStructureId. Requires existing raceId.
Expected 200. GET /api/admin/prize-structures and GET /api/admin/prize-structures/{id} should also return 200.
Expected 400 because startDate is after endDate.
Expected 200 OK. Assigns a staff member to manage the race.

item.name: 18. STAFF or ADMIN change race status to SCHEDULED

request.description: Expected 200 OK. Changes status from DRAFT to SCHEDULED.

item.name: 19. STAFF or ADMIN change race status to OPEN_FOR_ENTRY

request.description: Expected 200 OK. Changes status from SCHEDULED to OPEN_FOR_ENTRY if current time is within registration open/close window.

item.name: 20. STAFF or ADMIN change race status to CLOSED_FOR_ENTRY

request.description: Expected 200 OK. Changes status from OPEN_FOR_ENTRY to CLOSED_FOR_ENTRY.
Expected 200. Returns list of referee profiles.
Expected 200. Returns list of referee profiles.

item.name: 27. ADMIN create referee profile with non-referee role user
28. ADMIN create second profile for same referee user
29. ADMIN create referee profile with duplicate license
41. OWNER B registers OWNER A's Horse (404)

request.description: Expected 404. Horse belongs to another owner.

item.name: 43. STAFF B views STAFF A's Race registrations (403)
44. STAFF B approves STAFF A's Race registration (403)

request.description: Expected 403. Staff B is not assigned to the race.

item.name: 48. OWNER A sends Invitation to JOCKEY A
51. OWNER B sends Invitation for OWNER A's Registration (404/403)
54. JOCKEY B accepts JOCKEY A's Invitation (404/403)
55. JOCKEY B declines JOCKEY A's Invitation (404/403)

request.description: Expected 200 OK. Recalculates prize amount and score for race results and updates participating horses scores and classes.
